# azurefoundry_agent_v2 (Resource)

Manages an Azure AI Foundry Agent.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `kind` (String) The agent Kind: One of "prompt", "hosted", "container_app", "workflow".
- `model` (String) The model deployment name (e.g. `gpt-4o`, `gpt-4o-mini`).
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `description` (String) A short description of the agent.
- `instructions` (String) The system prompt for the agent.
- `metadata` (Map of String) Up to 16 key/value string pairs.
- `tools` (Block List) Tools enabled for the agent. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--tools))

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (Number)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `version` (String)

<a id="nestedblock--tools"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tools`

Required:

- `type` (String) Tool type: Includes `file_search`.

Optional:

- `max_num_results` (Number)
- `vector_store_ids` (List of String) Vector store IDs (from `azurefoundry_vector_store`) to attach to the `file_search` tool. Maximum 1.
